title: ZTONMC|忠诚市
description:
这是一个专注于铁路的整合包，这里有自动的铁路系统，为你减少驾驶烦恼！

This is an integrated package focused on railways, with an automatic railway system to reduce your driving troubles!
body:
忠诚市是《我的世界》中以铁路系统为核心的终极整合包，整合了数十款专业铁路模组，可一站式完成从基础铺设到复杂运营的铁路项目。

The Problem City is the ultimate modpack in *Minecraft* centered around a railway system. It integrates dozens of professional railway mods, enabling one-stop completion of railway projects from basic laying to complex operations.

核心铁路模组
‌基础与进阶铺设‌：包含“我的世界铁路”“天津地铁”“云竹铁路扩展”等模组，提供铁轨、信号灯、道岔等基础组件，支持曲线轨道、高架桥等复杂地形铺设，适配不同场景需求。
‌运输与载具‌：整合“常磐装饰”模组，涵盖货运车厢、客运列车、缆车等载具，支持自动化调度与多线程运输，可模拟真实铁路物流系统。

Core Railway Mods   
‌Basic and Advanced Laying‌: Includes mods such as "Minecraft Railway", "Tianjin Metro", and "Yunzhu Railway Expansion". It provides basic components like rails, signal lights, and switches, supports laying on complex terrains such as curved tracks and viaducts, and adapts to different scenario needs
‌Transportation and Vehicles‌: Integrates the "Tokyo Metro Decoration" mod, covering vehicles such as freight cars, passenger trains, and cable cars. It supports automated scheduling and multi-threaded transportation, and can simulate real railway logistics systems.

‌场景与装饰‌：包含“MSD铁路设施装饰”“伦敦地铁扩展”等模组，提供车站、站台、信号塔等建筑装饰。

‌Scenes and Decorations‌: Includes mods such as "MSD Railway Facilities Decoration" and "London Underground Expansion", providing architectural decorations like stations, platforms, and signal towers.
